The Bob’s Burgers Movie (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,933,830Details
International Box Office $2,214,920
Worldwide Box Office $34,148,750
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $719,183
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,023,339
Total $1,742,522
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story begins when a ruptured water main creates an enormous sinkhole right in front of Bob's Burgers, blocking the entrance indefinitely and ruining the Belchers’ plans for a successful summer. While Bob and Linda struggle to keep the business afloat, the kids try to solve a mystery that could save their family's restaurant. As the dangers mount, these underdogs help each other find hope and fight to get back behind the counter, where they belong.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,416,819 (38.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.57 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,425 opening theaters/3,425 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $36,270,518

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 27th, 2022 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: May 25th, 2022 (Wide), released as Bob's Burgers - Il Film (Italy)
May 26th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
May 26th, 2022 (Wide), released as Bob's Burgers: La Película (Mexico)
May 26th, 2022 (Wide), released as Bob’s Burgers: La película (Argentina)
May 26th, 2022 (Wide), released as Bob’s Burgers: La película (Chile)
Video Release: July 12th, 2022 by 20th Century Studios
MPA Rating: PG-13 for rude/suggestive material and language.
(Rating bulletin 2708 (cert #53341), 11/24/2021)
Cast, crew, or production detail: Posthumous Release, Prologue
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Framed, Hostage, Land Developer, Money Troubles, Murder Mystery
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox Animation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The story begins when a ruptured water main creates an enormous sinkhole right in front of Bob's Burgers, blocking the entrance indefinitely and ruining the Belchers’ plans for a successful summer. While Bob and Linda struggle to keep the business afloat, the kids try to solve a mystery that could save their family's restaurant. As the dangers mount, these underdogs help each other find hope and fight to get back behind the counter, where they belong.
